---
title: "Career"
toc: true
---

::: {.section-block}
## Education {.section-title}

- **Ph.D. student in Electronic Engineering**  
  Hanyang University, Seoul, Republic of Korea  
  Mar 2024 - Aug 2027 (expected) | GPA: 4.3/4.5

- **M.S. in Solid-state Physics**  
  Dongguk University, Seoul, Republic of Korea  
  Sep 2022 - Feb 2024 | GPA: 4.5/4.5

- **B.S. in Physics**  
  Dongguk University, Seoul, Republic of Korea  
  Mar 2016 - Aug 2022 | GPA: 4.2/4.5
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Appointments {.section-title}

- **Ph.D. researcher**, Semiconductor Nanophotonics Laboratory (SNLab), Hanyang University  
  Mar 2024 - Present

- **M.S. researcher**, Advanced Physics on Electromaterial Laboratory (APEL), Dongguk University  
  Sep 2022 - Feb 2024

- **Undergraduate researcher**, APEL, Dongguk University  
  Jul 2021 - Aug 2022

:::

::: {.section-block}
## Scholarships and Awards {.section-title}

- Physics Department Alumni Scholarship (Dongguk University), 2022 and 2023
- Dongguk 1.1.1 Scholarship (Dongguk University), 2021
- Dongguk Future Talent Scholarship (Dongguk University), 2022 and 2023
- IC-PBL Graduate Championship, 3rd Award (Hanyang University), 2024
:::

::: {.section-block}
## Skills {.section-title}

- **Spectroscopy:** tip-enhanced nano-spectroscopy, ellipsometry, DLTS, and XPS
- **Machine Learning:** Physics-based analysis, deep learning for spectroscopic data, and explainable AI
- **Simulation:** Finite-Difference Time-Domain (FDTD), inverse design with adjoint optimization
- **Fabrication and Characterization:** Electrical I-V/transient tests,  photolithography, sputtering
:::
